raw_response:
BOTTLENECK: latency-bound
REASONING: This kernel performs no GPU computation whatsoever—it only calls `cudaDeviceSynchronize()` and `std::puts()`, both of which are host-side operations. The entire execution time is dominated by CUDA API launch/synchronization latency and host-side I/O, with zero useful work being dispatched to the GPU. There is no compute, memory, or occupancy bottleneck because no kernel is actually launched.
